description_long: This is a black roadside assistance vehicle, resembling a utility van or service truck, equipped with a large, enclosed cargo area and a cab for the driver and passenger. The vehicle features a robust roof rack system holding several ladders or long tools, indicating its use for maintenance or repair tasks. The body is mostly solid black with metallic accents on the front grille and wheels, and the windows are tinted for privacy. The rear of the vehicle is boxy, with visible taillights and what appear to be rear access doors for equipment storage. The side profile shows a single cab door and a long, uninterrupted cargo section, suggesting ample storage space inside. There are no visible company logos, branding, or high-visibility markings, but the utilitarian design and equipment racks make it well-suited for urban roadside assistance operations.
description: A black utility van with a roof rack carrying ladders, designed for roadside assistance and equipped with a large enclosed cargo area and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black cab, metallic grille, windshield, and the roof rack with ladders clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the single cab door, long cargo area, and the full length of the roof rack with ladders.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the boxy cargo section, taillights, and the rear end of the roof rack and ladders.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, cargo area, and the roof rack, but from the opposite side.
attribute_equipment_racks: Roof rack system on top of the vehicle, holding multiple ladders or long tools, spanning the length of the cargo area.
